marketName: Data Processing, Hosting, and Related Services

alternatives.name: Wired electronic exit alarm (panel-integrated) — ~50% share
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires conduit per door; high retrofit cost in legacy DCs; IP-native via panel but mains-dependent unless on dedicated UPS circuit; single panel failure = coverage loss across entire zone

alternatives.name: Wireless IoT door alarm guard (Türwächter category) — ~30%
alternatives.tradeoffs: No wiring; battery fail-safe; mechanical alarm independent of power; proprietary radio protocol requires IP gateway for PACS/SIEM; RF attenuation in metal-dense server halls; surface-mount only

alternatives.name: Mechanical-only door prop / handle alarm — ~20%
alternatives.tradeoffs: Lowest cost; zero installation complexity; zero remote alerting; zero digital audit trail; cannot satisfy SOC 2 CC6.4 digital logging requirement -- eliminated by compliance mandate

alternatives.name: Door contact sensor + PACS integration (IP-native)
alternatives.tradeoffs: IP-native from day one; license-per-door cost; no physical guard/locking function; can be bypassed by physical force without guaranteed alarm; no mechanical fail-safe

alternatives.name: Do nothing / manual inspection rounds
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero capex; zero audit trail; guard log does not satisfy SOC 2 digital evidence standard; most common competitor because switching cost appears high and compliance risk appears low until audit
